chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. No. D – 04 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of MA No.189/2024 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 30.05.2024 Syed Ali Murtaza Shah, Advocate for Applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant, does not press this Criminal Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
